parsed.name: driver-compare-delete
parsed.description: DELETE by primary key — pycubrid (Pure Python) vs CUBRIDdb (C extension). Same CUBRID 11.2 server, same CAS protocol, isolates driver implementation.

queries:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS bench_delete
CREATE TABLE bench_delete (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  amount INT NOT NULL
)
INSERT INTO bench_delete (name, amount)
SELECT 'user_' || CAST(ROWNUM AS VARCHAR), MOD(ROWNUM, 10000)
FROM db_class
LIMIT 100000
